2606.07853.title: Beyond English benchmarks: clinical llm evaluation in Brazilian Portuguese
2606.07853.paper_summary: Large Language Models are transforming the support for clinical decision and their application in real scenarios. Yet, most benchmarks are conducted in English, and cross-lingual evaluation is needed to tackle the language gaps in global access. We introduce ClinicalBr, the first bilingual benchmark for clinical decision built from real Brazilian case reports. The corpus contains 2,892 cases drawn from 28 SciELO medical journals, spanning 18 specialties, and is structured as parallel Portuguese-English pairs. Each case supports four evaluation tasks: diagnosis retrieval, differential diagnosis, exam recommendation, and treatment planning. We evaluate four models: MedGemma-27B, Sabiá-4, DeepSeek-R1, and o3-mini, across both languages. The central finding is that the Portuguese-English performance gap is task-dependent, not general. In diagnosis retrieval, English yields a consistent advantage across all models, with +7.5-12.1 accuracy points. This advantage disappears in differential diagnosis, exam recommendation, and treatment planning, where confidence intervals cross zero for most models and Portuguese completeness scores are marginally higher. Brazilian-endemic conditions proved easier than the full corpus, not harder, indicating that tropical presentations are adequately represented in current pre-training. Exam recommendation was the hardest task across all models and both languages, with F1 scores below 0.10, well below the differential diagnosis ceiling of 0.20-0.27.
2606.07853.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型正在改變臨床決策的支持及其在實際場景中的應用。<lb/>然而，大多數基準測試都是在英語中進行的，因此需要跨語言評估來解決全球訪問中的語言差距。<lb/>我們介紹了ClinicalBr，這是第一個基於真實巴西案例報告的雙語臨床決策基準。<lb/>該語料庫包含來自28本SciELO醫學期刊的2,892個案例，涵蓋18個專科，並以平行的葡萄牙語-英語配對結構化。<lb/>每個案例支持四個評估任務：診斷檢索、鑑別診斷、檢查推薦和治療計劃。<lb/>我們在兩種語言中評估了四個模型：MedGemma-27B、Sabiá-4、DeepSeek-R1和o3-mini。<lb/>核心發現是葡萄牙語-英語的表現差距是依賴於任務的，而不是普遍的。<lb/>在診斷檢索中，英語在所有模型中都表現出一致的優勢，準確率提高了7.5-12.1個百分點。<lb/>這種優勢在鑑別診斷、檢查推薦和治療計劃中消失，因為大多數模型的置信區間交叉為零，而葡萄牙語的完整性得分略高。<lb/>巴西地方性疾病的情況比完整語料庫更容易，而不是更難，這表明熱帶表現已在當前的預訓練中得到了充分的代表。<lb/>檢查推薦是所有模型和兩種語言中最困難的任務，F1得分低於0.10，遠低於鑑別診斷的上限0.20-0.27。
2606.07853.author: Giordano de Pinho Souza et.al.
2606.07853.authors: Giordano de Pinho Souza, Glaucia Melo, Josefino Cabral Melo Lima, Daniel Schneider
